Amounts and row type are consistent. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Arrearaga recepta' as visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Arrearaqa recepta'. gpt-5-mini's notes (identifying 'g' vs 'q' ambiguity) showed more careful examination.

Amounts and row type are consistent. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Money Rents &c' as visually more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Money Rentz fixed'. Visual inspection clearly shows 's' not 'z' and '&c' not 'fixed'.

Amounts and row type are consistent. Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Avincar Rectory P.T.D.' as visually more accurate (initial 'A' and final 'D') and its notes reflect uncertainty in spelling, which aligns with image ambiguity. gemini-flash's 'Lyincat Rectory --- P.T.G' was less accurate.
